name: Brave Search
description: Privacy-focused web search via Brave API. Great for research and real-time information.

name: Exa Search
description: Neural search engine optimised for AI agents. Semantic + keyword search with full content.

name: Tavily Search
description: Search API built for AI agents. Returns clean, structured results with citations.

name: GitHub
description: Search repos, read files, manage issues and PRs. Full GitHub API access for the AI.

name: GitLab
description: Manage GitLab projects, issues, merge requests and CI/CD pipelines.

name: Filesystem
description: Read and write local files. You control exactly which directories are accessible.
notes: Edit the path in the Args field to set which directories the AI can access.

name: Puppeteer
description: Browser automation: navigate pages, take screenshots, fill forms, extract content.

name: Git
description: Read git history, diffs, branches and commit information from local repositories.
notes: Requires uv (pip install uv). Edit the repository path in the Args field.

name: PostgreSQL
description: Query and explore PostgreSQL databases. Read-only by default for safety.
notes: Replace the connection string in the Args field with your database URL.

name: SQLite
description: Read and query local SQLite databases. Great for local data exploration.
notes: Requires uv (pip install uv). Edit the database path in the Args field.

name: Memory (Knowledge Graph)
description: Persistent memory store using a knowledge graph. Lets the AI remember things across sessions.

name: Slack
description: Read channels, search messages and post replies to Slack workspaces.

name: Google Drive
description: Search, read and summarise files from Google Drive and Google Docs.
notes: Requires a Google OAuth client credentials JSON file.

name: Linear
description: Manage Linear issues, cycles and projects. Great for engineering project tracking.

name: Sequential Thinking
description: Structured multi-step reasoning tool. Helps the model think through complex problems.

name: Fetch
description: Fetch web pages and convert them to markdown. Gives the AI access to any URL.

name: DuckDuckGo Search
description: Privacy-focused web search with no API key required. Uses DuckDuckGo's public search.

name: Perplexity Search
description: AI-powered search that returns answers with cited sources. Great for research and fact-checking.

name: Playwright
description: Official Microsoft browser automation MCP. Navigate, screenshot, click and extract content from any webpage.

name: Browserbase
description: Cloud-hosted browser automation — no local Chrome needed. Runs browsers in the cloud for the AI.
